description: Perform a piecewise linear regression (spline) analysis on the 'food.gdt' dataset (~/Documents/gretl_data/food.gdt) to test for a structural break in the Marginal Propensity to Consume at an income level of 20. Create a spline knot variable named 'income_over_20' representing the value (income - 20) for income levels above 20, and 0 otherwise. Estimate an OLS model with 'food_exp' as the dependent variable and 'income', 'income_over_20', and a constant as regressors. Save the regression output to /home/ga/Documents/gretl_output/spline_regression.txt. Calculate the total marginal effect of income for households with income > 20 and save the numeric value to /home/ga/Documents/gretl_output/high_income_slope.txt.
